## Component submission

**Component name:** <!-- e.g. Neon Button -->
**Category:** <!-- buttons / inputs / display / layout / navigation / feedback / templates -->

### Checklist

- [ ] `.ctkcomp` file added under `components/`
- [ ] Preview `.png` added under `components/` (≤ 1 MB, square works best)
- [ ] Entry added to `index.json` (matching `id` + filenames)
- [ ] `id` is lowercase with underscores (`my_button`, not `MyButton`)
- [ ] `id` is unique — does not collide with an existing component
- [ ] Imports cleanly into a fresh CTkMaker project without errors
- [ ] Component upload size ≤ 25 MB (and any embedded image ≤ 5 MB)

### Notes for the maintainer (optional)

<!-- Anything worth flagging — known limitations, dependencies, version it was tested with, etc. -->
